library.title: Reports
library.subtitle: Run and export predefined HR reports.

salaryInformation.title: Salary Information
salaryInformation.description: Each staff member's salary on their current open contract.

contractInformation.title: Contract Information
contractInformation.description: Open contract details for every member of staff.

contractAnalysis.title: Contract Analysis
contractAnalysis.description: Open contracts summarised by service term.

terminatingContracts.title: Terminating Contracts
terminatingContracts.description: Contracts ending within a chosen period.

staffAbsenceAnalysis.title: Staff Absence Analysis
staffAbsenceAnalysis.description: Absences for a period, grouped by service term.

individualAbsence.title: Individual Absence
individualAbsence.description: All absences for one member of staff.

longTermAbsence.title: Long-Term Absence Analysis
longTermAbsence.description: Extended absences over three years, for insurance.

staffTraining.title: Staff Training
staffTraining.description: Courses a member of staff has taken.

trainingCourse.title: Training Course
trainingCourse.description: Course details and its list of attendees.

setCriteria: Set your criteria and run the report.

salaryInformation.loadError: Couldn't run the Salary Information report.
salaryInformation.empty: No open contracts match these criteria.

contractInformation.empty: No open contracts match these criteria.
